name: Midou Slow Rising Dumpling Squishy Butter Squeeze Toy Sensory Stress Relief Squishies Soft & Stretchy Fidget Toys for Anxiety Relief Party Favors 1Pcs with Smile Face
bullets: Relax and relieve stress, full of fun: This butter squeeze toy has an extremely soft and elastic unique texture. By gently squeezing and stretching, it can effectively relieve stress and anxiety. This sensory toy helps young people and adults concentrate and release emotions, and is a good helper for dealing with the daily busy life and study pressure

Safe Materials, Peace of Mind for Playtime: The product is made of high-quality, non-toxic PU material, which is soft and skin-friendly, and does not deform or break easily. This ensures a safe and reliable play experience for your family

Realistic and adorable, stimulating imagination: The realistic and bright butter shape, combined with a lively and cute smiling face, has a soft and chewy texture. Not only does it provide a sensory satisfaction, but it also stimulates imagination. It can be used in creative games like pretend play, doubling the fun

Suitable for multiple scenarios, super value gift set: It contains 1 individual packaged butter-shaped toys, with various colors. They are very suitable as gifts for birthday parties, class rewards, holiday presents or fillers for surprise gift bags. This is an excellent choice for promoting social sharing and group activities

Durable and easy to clean, long-lasting companion: The material is tough and durable, allowing for repeated kneading and playing. The surface is smooth. When dust gets on it, simply wipe it clean with a damp cloth. It is convenient and hygienic, and can remain a favorite in the toy box for a long time

Slow rising dumpling design with butter texture: Features a unique dumpling shape with slow rising properties that provides satisfying tactile feedback and sensory stimulation during play and stress relief activities
